description: Letter drafts from a certain Shelomo. Rudimentary handwriting. On recto he states that he is unable to come because his father is sick. The draft on verso is addressed to Avraham ha-Sar Ner ha-Maʿaravi (probably Avraham Maimonides). In the margin he mentions "my brother and lord Abū l-Ṭāhir." (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
